---
title: "Publications and Working Papers"
---

# Working Papers

**Li Yuan.** *Nonlinear Time Series Modeling Using Bernstein Polynomials and Bayesian Inference.* Manuscript in preparation for *Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)*.

**Li Yuan.** *Critical Illness Outcomes of Hospitalized Pregnant Women
Following a Texas Abortion Ban* Manuscript in preparation for *American Journal of Respiratory and Critical Care Medicine*.

**Li Yuan** *Novel Point-of-Care Diagnostic Risk Model and Clinical Calculator for Biliary Atresia*
Manuscript in preparation.

# Publications

**Li Yuan.** *Rate-Perturbing Single Amino Acid Mutation for Hydrolases: A Statistical Profiling.* *The Journal of Physical Chemistry B*.  
[View paper](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acs.jpcb.1c05901)
